applied_optimizations.name: Fused Mish+Tanh Triton kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented fused tanh(mish(x)) kernel using ROCm-compatible Triton: manual tanh via (exp(2x)-1)/(exp(2x)+1), tl.math.exp/log instead of tl.exp/log, BLOCK_SIZE=256 (multiple of 64 for wavefront alignment), explicit float32 casting. Fuses Mish (x*tanh(softplus(x))) and Tanh into single kernel to reduce memory bandwidth.

notes: Final verified: PyTorch ref=4.61ms, Triton kernel=4.44ms, speedup=1.038x, SCORE=60.4
Convolution dominates at 75% GPU time (MIOpen/CK backend - already highly optimized)
Fused activation kernel is 8% of time at ~3.6ms - efficient for elementwise operation
Limited optimization headroom: convolution is vendor-optimized, activation is already fused
ROCm Triton constraints followed: manual tanh, tl.math.exp/log, BLOCK_SIZE multiple of 64, explicit float32 casting
Previous failed attempt used tl.exp/tl.log/tl.tanh which are unavailable on ROCm Triton
